title: Project-A research assistant repository
raw_summary: An AI assistant repository pattern combining web search, task management, and research paper analysis.
user_note: Saved as a nearby workflow signal for research-plus-task tooling, with risk of drifting into a generic assistant.

evidence_notes.claim: Research assistant projects cluster around source collection plus task workflow features.

evidence_notes.claim: The repo is only indirect evidence for an experiment-selection wedge.

risks: Could become a generic assistant instead of a decision-quality tool

review_notes: Relevant to experiment selection because it shows adjacent demand for research workflow tooling.

title: Structured signals outperform generative matching in reviewer selection
raw_summary: Simple statistical or structured representations can outperform generative AI for matching and scoring tasks.

evidence_notes.claim: Structured scoring can be a useful baseline before LLM recommendations.
